nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 8am, then a slight chance of rain showers between 8am and 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 64. Southwest wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 53. Southwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 67. Southwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Rain And Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 5am, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Northwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 44. Northeast wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 11pm, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind 9 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night

alerts.headline: Special Weather Statement issued March 28 at 6:23PM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
A dry but breezy day is forecast for Sunday, with relative
humidities in the afternoon expected to drop into the 30 to 40
percent range and southwesterly wind gusts between 25 and 30 mph.
When combined with the lack of recent significant rainfall,
elevated fire weather potential will exist for Sunday in those
areas where the snowpack has completely melted.

Use caution when handling and disposing of ignition sources such
as matches and cigarettes.
